title: Practice Basic CPR
description: Use a training manikin and CPR mask to rehearse chest compressions so you can respond safely in an emergency. Always ensure the scene is safe and call emergency services before starting.

dialogue.text: With your first aid kit ready, confirm the area is safe, call emergency services, and check the dummy's airway before you begin.

Place the heel of one hand in the center of the chest and interlock your fingers. Push down about 2 inches at 100-120 compressions per minute, allowing full recoil each time. Use the CPR mask from your kit for rescue breaths if you're trained.
Great job! Regular practice with a manikin and mask helps you respond calmly and safely. Remember, real emergencies should be handled by certified professionals whenever possible.
